items.headline: U.S. Futures Show Mixed Movement as Inflation Concerns Ease
items.summary: U.S. stock futures are showing mixed movements this morning as investors continue to digest recent inflation data. June's Consumer Price Index (CPI) fell 0.4%, with core inflation flat at 2.6% over the past year, easing borrowing costs with the 10-year Treasury yield around 4.57%. The dollar is hovering near a one-month low. Market sentiment remains cautious but generally improved following softer producer inflation data.

items.headline: Agape ATP Soars on Pre-Market Volume
items.summary: Agape ATP ($ATPC.US$) saw a significant jump in pre-market trading with a turnover of $6.41 million.

items.headline: PayPal Jumps on Takeover Bid Rumors
items.summary: PayPal Holdings ($PYPL) surged in pre-market after reports emerged of a $53 billion takeover bid from Stripe and Advent.

items.headline: BlackRock Rises Post Q2 Earnings
items.summary: BlackRock ($BLK) gained after reporting stronger-than-expected Q2 earnings, with analysts highlighting operating leverage.

items.headline: Cardiff Oncology Leads Pre-Market Declines
items.summary: Cardiff Oncology, Inc. ($CRDF) experienced a sharp decline in pre-market trading.

items.headline: Vivakor Shares Fall Significantly
items.summary: Vivakor, Inc. ($VIVK) saw a substantial drop in its share price during pre-market hours.

items.headline: Progressive Slips on Analyst Downgrades
items.summary: Progressive ($PGR) declined after analysts trimmed price targets, citing slower growth and higher loss ratios.

items.headline: Cooling Inflation Data Dampens Fed Rate Hike Expectations
items.summary: June's U.S. consumer prices fell by 0.4%, and core inflation remained flat at 2.6% over the last year. This softer-than-expected inflation data has led markets to pare back Federal Reserve rate hike expectations, with chances for a July hike reduced to 11%.

items.headline: TSMC Reports Strong Q2 Earnings and Announces Major U.S. Investment
items.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. ($TSM) reported robust Q2 2026 earnings, with diluted EPS of NT$27.25 (US$4.31 per ADR unit) and revenue increasing 36.0% year-over-year. The company also announced an additional $100 billion investment in U.S. semiconductor manufacturing, bringing its total U.S. investment to $265 billion for 12 facilities.

items.headline: BASF Raises Full-Year Earnings Outlook After Strong Q2
items.summary: BASF Group released preliminary figures for the second quarter of 2026, with EBIT before special items reaching an expected €1.5 billion, significantly above analyst consensus. The company has subsequently increased its earnings outlook for the full-year 2026.

items.headline: Alibaba's Qwen AI to Integrate into Apple's China Features
items.summary: Alibaba announced that its Qwen large AI model will be integrated into Apple's AI features for China-market iPhones. This follows the completion of regulatory filing for Apple Intelligence in China, with Alibaba confirmed as one of Apple's partners.

items.headline: Key Economic Data Releases Expected Today
items.summary: Today's economic calendar includes the release of U.S. Retail Sales for June, Jobless Claims, and the Philly Fed Index for July. The Bank of Korea also announced a policy adjustment, raising interest rates for the first time since 2023 to curb inflation.
